audience_policies.source_phrase: Admits up to 2 adults at $15 per person and 4 youths (ages 7-17) at $10 per person. Ages 6 and under are free. Pass can be presented on a hand held device, as a paper printout at the museum, or used to reserve general admission and special exhibit tickets online.
